ast.source: Tag to use in a note's metadata to indicate that it is an index note.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Tag to use in a note's metadata to indicate that it is a meta index note (an index of indices).
ast.target: 用于笔记元数据中表示该笔记为元索引笔记（索引的索引）的标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Tag to use for pushing a note to the top of an index subsection.
ast.target: 用于将笔记推至索引子章节顶部的标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If an entry named 'title' is found in the frontmatter, show it in the index next to the link.
ast.target: 如果在前置信息中找到名为 'title' 的条目，则在索引中链接旁显示它。
